system.Text:
__When your command, support, or incidental asset faces a damaging situation or environment__, suffer -1 integrity for minor damage, -2 for serious damage, or -3 for major damage. If your integrity is 0, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} equal to any remaining damage.

Then, if your integrity is 0 or you choose to resist the damage, roll +integrity.

On a __strong hit__, choose one.

  * Damage Control: If your asset is not battered, you may @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} in exchange for +1 integrity.
  * Hold Fast: Take +1 momentum.

On a __weak hit__, you carry on.

On a __miss__, it’s worse than you thought. Suffer an additional -1 integrity or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2). If your integrity is 0, also suffer a cost according to the type below.

  * __Command asset:__ Mark the asset as __battered__ or __cursed__, mark a linked asset as __broken__, destroy a broken linked asset by discarding it, or roll on the table below. If the command asset is destroyed, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a44ecb0d77487549]{Overcome Destruction}.
  * __Support asset:__ Mark the asset as __battered__ or roll on the table below. If the asset is destroyed, discard the asset.
  * __Incidental asset:__ Roll on the table below.

Trigger.Text: When your vehicle faces a damaging situation or environment...

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, choose one.

  * Damage Control: If your asset is not battered, you may @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} in exchange for +1 integrity.
  * Hold Fast: Take +1 momentum.

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, you carry on.

Miss.Text:
On a __miss__, it’s worse than you thought. Suffer an additional -1 integrity or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2). If your integrity is 0, also suffer a cost according to the type below.

  * __Command asset:__ Mark the asset as __battered__ or __cursed__, mark a linked asset as __broken__, destroy a broken linked asset by discarding it, or roll on the table below. If the command asset is destroyed, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a44ecb0d77487549]{Overcome Destruction}.
  * __Support asset:__ Mark the asset as __battered__ or roll on the table below. If the asset is destroyed, discard the asset.
  * __Incidental asset:__ Roll on the table below.
